---
name: Feature request
about: A new capability or improvement
labels: enhancement
---

## What you want

<!-- One sentence: the feature, plus what it enables. -->

## Why

<!-- The user problem this solves. Be concrete — "I keep having to do
     X manually" is more useful than "would be nice to have". -->

## How it might work

<!-- Sketch the UX or API surface. File kinds, LLM tools, inspector
     fields, key flow. Not a full design — just enough that we can
     discuss scope. -->

## Existing roadmap row?

<!-- Check ROADMAP.md. If there's a 🔮 planned / 📋 next row that
     matches, link it. If you'd like to implement, mention so. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- What you tried or considered, and why this is better. -->

## Notes

<!-- Anything else: related FreeCAD/Rhino/Revit features for parity,
     OSS libraries that could power this, etc. -->
